name: Cliff's Check Cashing #18
description_short: Cliff's Check Cashing offers check cashing, personal installment loans ($100-$1,760), money transfers, and prepaid cards at multiple Texas locations with same-day service.
description_long: Cliff's Check Cashing operates as a multi-service financial services provider with locations across Texas, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional banks for unbanked and underbanked consumers. The company has been in operation for at least several years, with established customer loyalty and a focus on quick transactions during extended hours when banks are closed. Their primary service—check cashing—includes payroll checks, tax refunds, government checks, insurance checks, two-party checks, and business checks, with online upload capability to reduce wait times. Beyond check cashing, Cliff's has diversified into personal installment loans ranging from $100 to $1,760, which the company explicitly markets as a lower-interest alternative to traditional payday loans. They partner with Netspend for prepaid debit cards, MoneyGram for domestic and international wire transfers and money orders, and offer additional services like bill payment, ATM access, mailbox rental, and even Texas lottery ticket sales. What distinguishes Cliff's from competitors is their emphasis on customer service quality—multiple customer reviews specifically praise named employees for professionalism and kindness—combined with promotional offers like first-time customer coupons and a High Volume Customer Club for frequent users. The company also highlights competitive check-cashing fees, though specific rates are not disclosed on the website. However, Cliff's remains fundamentally a check-cashing and short-term lending operation targeting consumers without access to traditional banking, and their personal installment loans, while positioned as low-interest alternatives, still represent a form of short-term consumer debt. The absence of transparent fee disclosure and loan term information on the public website is a notable gap for consumer research.
address: 2310 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Dallas, TX 75215

company_info.headquarters: 2310 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Dallas, TX 75215

pros: Online check upload feature to reduce in-store wait times
Personal installment loans up to $1,760 explicitly marketed as lower-interest alternative to payday loans
Extended hours accommodating customers when banks are closed (evidenced by MLK Jr. Day transaction)
Multiple service offerings under one roof: check cashing, wire transfers, money orders, prepaid cards, bill payment, ATM
First-time customer coupon available for new clients
High Volume Customer Club loyalty program for frequent customers
Bilingual support (English/Spanish) and established multi-location network across Texas
Consistent positive customer reviews highlighting employee professionalism and service quality
cons: Specific check-cashing fees not disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
Personal installment loan terms (APR, repayment periods, eligibility requirements) not detailed on website
Limited to Texas locations only—not a nationwide service
Still operates as short-term lending business despite positioning as 'smart choice' alternative, which may encourage repeat borrowing
No indication of credit-building benefits or financial education resources
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need same-day check cashing outside traditional banking hours
Self-employed individuals and small business owners who receive checks from multiple sources
Texas residents seeking personal installment loans as alternative to higher-cost payday lenders
International money transfer needs through MoneyGram partnership
diagnosis: Cliff's Check Cashing is best for Texas residents without traditional bank accounts who need same-day check cashing and occasional short-term personal loans. The primary caveat is that while they position installment loans as alternatives to payday lenders, they remain a short-term lending operation, and the lack of published fee and term information makes it difficult to independently verify their cost-competitiveness claims.
services: Check cashing (payroll, tax refund, government, insurance, two-party, business, cashier's checks, lawsuit settlement)
Netspend prepaid debit cards (no credit check, no minimum balance)
Mailbox rental and private mailbox rental
